features.title: Advisor service + grounding 组装 + JSON 引用契约 + INSUFFICIENT_GROUNDING + red-team 接真 advisor
features.acceptance: (1) workbench_api/advisor/grounding.py: build_grounding(sleeve) -> Grounding 取 quant signal (含 sha) + B034 NewsAssociationService.news_for_sleeve (含 url) + B035 MarketContextRepository.latest_by_series；(2) workbench_api/advisor/schema.py: AdviceOutput JSON schema (per-sleeve advice/rationale/references[{quant_signal_sha, news_urls}]) + 纯 Python 校验函数 validate_references(output, grounding) (每 quant_signal_sha==grounding sha + 每 news_url ∈ grounding urls)；(3) workbench_api/advisor/service.py: AdvisorService.advise_sleeve(sleeve) -> AdviceOutput: build grounding → quant 不可解析/无 signal 直接 INSUFFICIENT_GROUNDING → 构造 prompt (系统 prompt 含 v0.9.28 5 子条边界 + 引用契约 + JSON schema 指令) → gateway.advise(ChatRequest(task='daily_advisor')) (cost_guard 边界 m) → 解析 JSON → 校验 references ⊆ input set，越界→INSUFFICIENT_GROUNDING → 落 AdvisorRecommendation；(4) workbench_api/db/models/advisor_recommendation.py: AdvisorRecommendation (id UUID PK 复用 _UuidString / sleeve TEXT / advice_json JSON / quant_signal_sha TEXT / references_json JSON / model TEXT / status TEXT ok|insufficient_grounding / generated_at DateTime tz=True) + ix_sleeve + ix_generated_at；(5) workbench_api/db/repositories/advisor_recommendation.py: save + latest_by_sleeve；(6) migrations/0008_b036_advisor.py: down_revision='0007_b035_market_context'；alembic up 0008 + down 显式 0007 可逆；(7) **复用 B031/B032**：gateway.advise / judge.py / routing.py daily_advisor→claude-haiku-4.5 (模型名留 routing.py 边界 l；若 red-team haiku 不稳一行升 sonnet-4.6) / cost_guard 边界 m；不引新 secret (复用 AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY)；(8) **red-team 接真 advisor (B032 既有 test)**: tests/safety/test_ai_advisor_red_team.py 改为对 AdvisorService 真 advisor 跑 15 样本 (α 收益预测 / β 无引用 / γ 越界个股)，断言每个 judge_output(...).fail_triggered is False (被拒/INSUFFICIENT_GROUNDING)；(9) unit fixture-first: mock gateway 返回录制 advice JSON (合规 + 越界两类) 测 service 校验 + fallback，不打真 API；(10) pytest ≥12: grounding 组装 / advice schema 校验 / references 越界→INSUFFICIENT_GROUNDING / quant 不可解析→fallback / save+latest_by_sleeve / alembic 0008↔0007 / red-team 15 样本对真 advisor (CI 跑真 judge，gate)；(11) Gates: backend pytest ≥716 (B035 baseline 704 + ≥12) / ruff 0 / mypy 0 / alembic 可逆 / **red-team 15/15 拦截** / 无新 secret / frontend 不动；(12) 不动 B031 gateway/routing/cost_guard/judge 内核 / B032 dataset / B034 association / B035 market context / quant 信号生成逻辑 (只读 sha)。

features.title: 每日预计算（复用 B035 timer）+ 边界 (r) 修订守门
features.acceptance: (1) workbench_api/advisor/precompute.py: run_daily() 遍历 sleeve → AdvisorService.advise_sleeve → 落库 (幂等 by (sleeve, date))；(2) 复用 B035 systemd timer：扩 .service ExecStart 链 (market 拉取后跑 advisor precompute) 或新增 workbench-advisor.timer (每日，market 之后)；deploy.sh 接线；(3) **边界 (r) 修订守门 tests/safety/test_market_scheduler_scope.py 更新**: 允许 import advisor/llm 模块，但仍 AST 断言不 import broker/ticket/execution/下单模块 (调度器可跑已过 CI safety-gate 的 advisor 预计算，仍 NOT 交易执行)；(4) cost_guard 保护每日 N sleeve × advise ≤ ¥1500/月 cap (边界 m)；(5) advisor 输出永不触发下单 (边界 a) 守门；(6) pytest ≥6: precompute run_daily mock advisor 落库 / 二次幂等 / scope 守门 (允许 advisor 禁 broker/ticket) / cost_guard 触发 / timer .service ExecStart 含 advisor；(7) Gates: backend pytest ≥722 (F001 后 716 + ≥6) / ruff / mypy / 不引新 in-process scheduler dep / frontend 不动；(8) 不动 F001 advisor service / B035 market timer 只读拉取部分 / News (q) 边界。

features.title: Home AI Advisor 段 + GET /advisor API + INSUFFICIENT_GROUNDING fallback UI
features.acceptance: (1) workbench_api/schemas/advisor.py: AdvisorResponse { sleeves: [{sleeve, advice, rationale, references[{quant_signal_sha, news_urls}], status, generated_at}] }；(2) workbench_api/routes/advisor.py: GET /advisor (auth-gated, same-origin) → 读最新预计算 latest_by_sleeve；(3) **§12.10 请求路径自包含守门** test_advisor_request_self_contained；(4) 前端 (protected) Home AI Advisor 段: 渲染 advice + rationale + 引用 (news_urls 外链 rel=noopener + quant_signal_sha 标注)；status=insufficient_grounding → 显示 ai-safety §6.2 fallback 文案 (AI 建议未通过安全检查今日跳过)，**不影响** quant signal / news / risk 区；(5) backend pytest: GET /advisor 200 + auth-gated (未登录 401) + 响应 schema pin + ok 与 insufficient_grounding 两态；(6) frontend vitest 新增 advisor 段测试 (渲染建议+引用 / fallback 态 / 空态) + Playwright e2e (Home 加载 advisor 段 + fallback)；(7) **AI 边界 UI 守门**: advisor 段不含下单/执行按钮 (no-execution buttons 边界)；引用必渲染 (β 可引用)；(8) Gates: backend pytest ≥728 (F002 后 722 + ≥6) / frontend vitest ≥180 / Playwright ≥40 / lint 0 / typecheck pass / ruff / mypy；(9) 不动既有 Home 其他段 / recommendations/risk/execution / B026 banner / 设计稿一致 (若 design-draft 有 AI advisor 段稿则比对)。

features.title: Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff（里程碑 B 终点）
features.acceptance: L1 (CI 内): F001+F002+F003 全 generator 验收脚本跑通 — backend pytest ≥728 / ruff / mypy / alembic upgrade head (0008_b036_advisor) OK + downgrade 0007 OK；**red-team safety gate: 15/15 样本对真 advisor 100% 拦截 (CI safety-eval workflow success；失败则 deploy 拒绝)**；**边界 (r) 修订 scope 守门** (test_market_scheduler_scope: 允许 advisor，禁 broker/ticket/execution)；§12.10 自包含守门 (test_advisor_request_self_contained)；AI 5 子条 enforce (references ⊆ input set 校验测试)；no-execution buttons 守门 (advisor UI 无下单按钮 + 中文禁词)；Frontend vitest ≥180 + Playwright ≥40 不破；artifact grep AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY value 泄漏 = 0. L2 (真 VM): (1) curl /api/health 200 + SHA 与 main HEAD 等价 (v0.9.25)；(2) /api/debug/recent-errors = {count:0,records:[]}；(3) **v0.9.32 §23 新路由真 VM 200**: GET /api/advisor authenticated 200 + 结构化 payload (advice + references 或 insufficient_grounding 态)；anon 401；(4) **advisor 每日预计算跑通**: VM advisor_recommendation 表有当日数据 (或确认 timer 首跑 + 手跑 precompute 验证)；timer scope 含 advisor 且不碰交易/ticket (边界 r 修订 L2)；(5) **Production DB alembic head = '0008_b036_advisor'**；(6) Production HEAD ≡ main HEAD；(7) Home AI Advisor 段浏览器手验: 渲染建议 + 引用链接 (news_urls + quant_signal_sha) 或 fallback 态；无下单按钮 (AI 边界 UI)；截图；(8) safety-eval deploy gate 在本批次 deploy 链中确实 gating (确认 workflow 跑过且 green)；(9) News (q) 不变 + B026 banner absent；(10) Post-signoff Deploy 段 (v0.9.27 §21). Signoff: docs/test-reports/B036-ai-advisor-mvp-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md 用 framework/templates/signoff-report.md (含 §Post-signoff Deploy + §Production/HEAD + v0.9.32 §L2 新路由 200 勾选 + §Decommission '本批次不含')；docs/screenshots/B036-ai-advisor-mvp/ ≥2 PNG (Home AI Advisor 段 + alembic current 0008)；**标注里程碑 B / Phase 2 终点达成**. Framework 候选: 若 advisor/red-team/边界 (r) 修订/grounding 出现新通用规律记 signoff §Framework Learnings；B031 第三方 API live-validate 候选本批次复用 gateway 不新增 endpoint，若未撞则仍 hold (由 Planner done 阶段评估)。更新 progress.json status→done / docs.signoff / evaluator_feedback。
